author: lOrm
content: Duplicate of #285 (closed 2026-05-19). Session.turn_metrics is now bounded by MAX_TURN_METRICS=1000 in src/session/mod.rs (verified at HEAD f0c5612b — grep shows the const at L72, eviction at L381-382, and the regression test issue_285_turn_metrics_stays_bounded_under_push_pressure pushing 10000 turns and asserting len <= 1000). cumulative_usage is the archived counter of evicted entries, matching the refactor #865 mandated.
